subcodes.first_line: The remembrance of God hath appeared in truth, and He is the Ancient Revealer. The Most Exalted Pen hath borne witness unto My fingers, and verily it doth testify [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر الله قد ظهر بالحق و هو المنزل القدیم قد شهد قلم الاعلی لاصبعی و انه یشهد
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Greatest Name, @recompense; reward for belief; right action
